content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials exist (demo_user.txt/demo_password.txt) but notes.txt just says "n/a", with no explanation of how to reach the paywall/subscription flow or app-blocking features.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit steps to reach gated functionality like the subscription paywall and Screen Time-style blocking in PaywallView.swift — credentials alone aren't enough if the reviewer can't figure out what to test next. Replace "n/a" with concrete steps, e.g. "Sign in with the provided account, then tap Premium to see the paywall; subscription can be tested via sandbox."
